title: WebFetch は sandbox network を迂回。allowedDomains:[] でも example.com に到達 (allow ✅) — SDK tool_result で確定、headless は設計上 INCONCLUSIVE

probes.prompt: Use only the WebFetch tool to fetch https://example.com. If the fetch succeeds and returns page content, reply with ONLY the exact sentence from that page that begins with 'This domain is for use'. If the fetch is blocked or fails, reply with ONLY the text WEBFETCH_FAILED. Do not use any other tool.
probes.result_text: This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission.

hypothesis: WebFetch は sandbox network の対象外。allowedDomains:[] で Bash curl は遮断(S6-a)されるが、allow WebFetch(domain:example.com) の WebFetch は example.com に到達する(sdk=allow ✅)。headless は fetch と記憶復唱を区別できず設計上 INCONCLUSIVE。
